pairs.source: 欢迎各位参加今天的会议
pairs.reference: Welcome to today's meeting everyone
pairs.hypothesis: Welcome everyone to attend today's conference

pairs.source: 请大家保持安静
pairs.reference: Please keep quiet

pairs.source: 会议即将开始
pairs.reference: The meeting is about to begin
pairs.hypothesis: The conference is about to begin

pairs.source: 感谢大家的参与
pairs.reference: Thank you all for your participation

pairs.source: 我们开始今天的议题
pairs.reference: Let's start today's agenda

pairs.source: 首先，请允许我介绍今天的演讲嘉宾
pairs.reference: First, please allow me to introduce today's speakers
pairs.hypothesis: [EN] 首先，请允许我介绍今天的演讲嘉宾... (mock translation)

pairs.source: 感谢各位的精彩演讲

pairs.source: 会议到此结束
pairs.reference: This concludes today's meeting

pairs.source: 请各位会后交流
pairs.reference: Please feel free to network after the meeting

pairs.source: 我同意这个提议
pairs.reference: I agree with this proposal

pairs.source: 请看下一页PPT
pairs.reference: Please look at the next slide

pairs.source: 这个问题问得很好
pairs.reference: That's an excellent question
pairs.hypothesis: [EN] 这个问题问得很好... (mock translation)

pairs.source: 我们有十分钟的休息时间

pairs.hypothesis: [EN] 我们有十分钟的休息时间... (mock translation)

pairs.source: 让我们继续讨论
pairs.reference: Let's continue the discussion

pairs.source: Good morning everyone, let's begin the meeting
pairs.reference: 大家早上好，让我们开始会议
pairs.hypothesis: 大家早上好，让我们开始会议吧

pairs.reference: 这次演讲非常有帮助

pairs.source: Please sign the attendance sheet

pairs.source: Selamat pagi, mari kita mulai diskusi

pairs.hypothesis: 早上好，让我们开始讨论吧

pairs.source: 人工智能技术正在快速发展
pairs.reference: AI technology is developing rapidly

pairs.source: 机器学习是人工智能的核心
pairs.reference: Machine learning is the core of AI
pairs.hypothesis: Machine learning is the core of artificial intelligence

pairs.source: 深度学习在图像识别中应用广泛
pairs.reference: Deep learning is widely used in image recognition
pairs.hypothesis: Deep learning is widely used in image recognition

pairs.source: 神经网络可以处理复杂的模式
pairs.reference: Neural networks can handle complex patterns
pairs.hypothesis: Neural networks can handle complex patterns

pairs.source: 自然语言处理使机器理解人类语言
pairs.reference: NLP enables machines to understand human language
pairs.hypothesis: Natural language processing enables machines to understand human language

pairs.source: The neural network architecture uses transformer models
pairs.reference: 该神经网络架构使用Transformer模型

pairs.source: Machine learning algorithms require large datasets
pairs.reference: 机器学习算法需要大量数据集

pairs.source: Deep learning has revolutionized computer vision
pairs.reference: 深度学习革新了计算机视觉领域

pairs.source: Natural language processing applications include translation
pairs.reference: 自然语言处理的应用包括翻译

pairs.source: AI and machine learning are transforming industries
pairs.reference: 人工智能和机器学习正在改变各行业
